title: BRIO World 33884 Battery Powered Steam Locomotive Toy Train Engine with Refillable Water Tank, Cool-Touch Realistic Steam & Headlights, Fits BRIO Wooden Railway Track, Ages 3+
features: BRIO steam train for BRIO World tracks: battery engine with realistic, cool-touch steam from the chimney as it speeds around your railway.
High-quality compomemts: This item includes 1x Steaming Engine, 1x Wagon, 1x Water Tank which measures 18.1 x 3.7 x 5.1cm.
Compatible with BRIO World: trains, engines, wagons and vehicles use classic BRIO magnetic couplings for quick, easy connecting.
High-quality gift: Crafted using high-quality plastics the BRIO World railway range is suitable for ages 3 Years and up and make ideal gifts for boys and great gifts for girls.
Trusted BRIO quality: rigorously tested to strict safety standards, often exceeding legal requirements, so kids can play with confidence, even when used in unexpected ways.
description: From the manufacturer BRIO World - Battery-Operated Steaming Train "Full steam ahead!”. Chug around your BRIO World railway with realistic steam effects in the Battery-Operated Steaming Train. This battery-powered engine produces safe-to-touch steam from its chimney as it speeds down the tracks. Once you’re out of water, you can easily refill the engine using the refill load that’s being pulled behind the train. Press the red forward button on the top of the engine, the front light switches on as the steam starts to rise and you’re off again on more classic railway adventures. Contents 1x Battery-Operated Steaming Engine 1x Water Refill Wagon 1x Water Refill Load Battery-Operated Steaming Train Realistic steam effects puff from the chimney The battery-powered engine produces safe-to-touch steam from its chimney as it moves. Refill the water chamber easily using the cargo Use the refill load that’s being pulled behind the train to easily refill the water supply. Lights and action with battery-powered functions Press the red buttons on top of the engine to turn on the lights and move forwards and backwards. About BRIO World Open-ended play system BRIO World is our open-ended play system that grows with your child. All BRIO World toys work with each other to create an entirely customisable world that’s fuelled by children’s imaginations and endless combinations of play. Explore the world through play BRIO World is designed to help children discover and explore the real world. As they play with the recognisable vehicles, destinations and accessories, the realistic roleplay helps them to make sense of the world around them. Promotes creative thinking The construction elements within BRIO World challenge pre-schoolers to use their creativity and math skills as they play, such as patterning, classifying and sorting. Sibling safe with no small parts We’ve designed BRIO World to be sibling safe with no small parts. This means that children younger than 3 years can safely be a part of the same play environment. About BRIO About BRIO BRIO was founded in 1884 in Osby, a small town located in southern Sweden. It is now a world-renowned brand best known for its wooden railway system, which was first created in 1958 and now sold throughout the world. Tougher than tough Maybe we're control freaks, but we test our toys against tougher standards than the law demands. To be exact, we test our toys up to 25% more than the law demands. Toys that grow on trees Wood is one of our company’s strongest identifiers, and many of our wooden products have become icons in the world of toys. We’re proud to say that all wood used in our toys is from FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) certified sources.

specifications_table.Educational Objective(s): ‎To enhance fine motor skills, spatial awareness, and creativity while introducing basic principles of physics and engineering in a fun and interactive way.
specifications_table.Language:: ‎Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, Finnish, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Slovak, Spanish, Swedish
